code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut sum = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_boundary = false
    if i == n
      is_boundary = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
          is_boundary = true
        end
      when None
        is_boundary = true
      end
    end
    if is_boundary
      if start < i
        let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          if v > 0
            sum = sum + v * 2
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      start = i + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("result=#{sum}")
end
